text:
Fun fact: there was a Bill O'Reilly ytp that I discovered and enjoyed around the same time titled: Bill O'Reilly Goes to War With Bears, and that's where the audio came from. Years later I was so confused as to why it didn't have any views.

Can't find it anymore, but here's the source it used. https://youtu.be/SYC3fngxmfg

The footage was tweaked so that Bill-o was raving about exploding- PEOPLE- going after- BEARS, and they made it so the chopper made off with the tent with a bear still trapped inside.

text: I assure you, if you wouldn't have said this was bad almost no one would have seen this as such... maybe a bit outdated, but not bad. But I understand; it is in an artist to see the flaws and the what-ifs take over his/her own work. But really, this is great! For newcomers and veterans alike; even people nowadays think it is! Guess that's how a classic's born, even referencing jokes already made by other people is classic in a Youtube poop.

author: @shadowzone2588

text:
It's... the Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog opening. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5FreQCG9cvw

I'll apologize for my tone, this is just making me hearken back to the time I first uploaded this poop. I had like, five consecutive people who seriously didn't know it either.

Now I'm not knocking on you for it, but as a Sonic fan coming into Youtube Poop from just how prominent "Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog" was in the field of Youtube Poop, it seemed genuinely strange to find out that there were poop watchers out there that genuinely didn't know what the song was at that point.

text: So... If I turn in sonic, I get Tyranny, conquest, dictatorship, a tiny sack of dirty gold, a tip, BEEANZ, a whole cart full of wonderful junk, love, an all expense paid adventure holiday, a web of gooey gunkey cords (not sure I want to know what they are gooey and gunky WITH...), an army of robot soldiers, tea, something to eat, and a billion rings? So... In other words, I can go on the most fun and exciting vacation I've had in a long time, and on the way I can be super-indulgent, then when I get back there'll be a nice continental breakfast waiting for me, which I can eat while shuffling through my lovely junkwagon for anything particularly wonderful and passing the first mandates on my new dictatorship-kingdom. I'd have to assign most of my army to guard duty... dictators get murdered. Also, I'd be rich, and maybe have a new girlfriend? Oh, maybe it's me who makes the web of gooey, gunkey cords. That'd be better than it being someone else's...
